title: New ‘UFO files’ released by Pentagon: Videos show ‘orbs’ and ‘mysterious objects’
description: The release includes more than 50 videos along with documents and audio records.

title: Trump releases new batch of previously classified UFO files
description: The Trump administration has released a second batch of previously classified files on UFO sightings.

title: 'Truth is out there' UFO joke at council meeting sparks political jibe
description: Joke about UFOs at a North Yorkshire Council meeting were a sign “that the truth is out there” about a backroom political deal, it has been claimed.

title: Senior US Intelligence Officer's Terrifying UFO Encounter Revealed in Trump Administration Disclosure Release
description: The unnamed officer's encounter with mysterious 'orange orbs' near their helicopter in 2025, as they investigated loud thuds in the mountains on a secret mission, escalated into a series of close UAP encounters lasting over an hour. The report details encounters with glowing objects, one of which rose from the ground and flew within 10 feet of the helicopter before dropping below the aircraft and accelerating away at extreme speed.

title: UFO Files Show Explosive Missile Strike on Mysterious Object in US Airspace
description: The new UFO files released by the Pentagon-led committee depict an F-16 fighter jet engaging in an air-to-air missile strike on a mysterious object flying in America's airspace over Lake Huron. The footage captures the moment the small craft was struck by the missile, causing it to 'fragment' or break up into several pieces after an explosive collision.
